mapper.sql: id, thread_id, sender_role, content, hidden, hidden_reason, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM consult_message WHERE thread_id = #{threadId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consult_message (thread_id, sender_role, content, hidden, hidden_reason) VALUES (#{threadId}, #{senderRole}, #{content}, #{hidden}, #{hiddenReason})
